title: Maharashtra Govt signs MoUs of ₹6.5 lakh crore to generate 25,400 MW of nuclear power
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   The Maharashtra Government has signed Memorandums of Understanding (MoUs).
*   These MoUs are valued at ₹6.5 lakh crore.
*   The agreements aim to generate 25,400 MW of nuclear power.

title: Supreme Court allows for euthanasia of ‘rabid dogs’, refuses to recall directives to remove strays from public spaces
content:
The Supreme Court has permitted the euthanasia of 'rabid dogs.'
*   It refused to recall its existing directives concerning stray animals.
*   These directives mandate the removal of stray animals from public spaces.

title: Government misleading people on inflation, fuel shortage: Ashok Gehlot
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   Ashok Gehlot has accused the government.
*   The accusation is for misleading the public.
*   Specifically on the issues of inflation and fuel shortage.

title: Delhi Police suggest larger Supreme Court Bench to review UAPA bail restrictions
content:
The Delhi Police have suggested the Supreme Court form a larger bench.
*   The purpose of this bench would be to review existing bail restrictions.
*   These restrictions specifically pertain to cases under the Unlawful Activities (Prevention) Act (UAPA).
